name: Bimbo Bubblegum (Updated)
description:
You receive a crate of Bimbo Bubble from a shady company and their CEO, Mr. Oraxin. You're not sure why you have it, but it does look tasty!

Update 1 - 02/05: Added a few more lines to keep things consistent and added some specific lines for those who wanted to use it on pets/animals

Updated - 10/10

  • Improved Personality and Overall Chabot Stuff

  • Allowed Proxies (I Use Deepseek)

  • No NSFW Gallery
creator: Oraxin
